subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! News of the feast and celebration hath brought the utmost joy, under the shadow of the grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی میثاق از خبر جشن و سور نهایت سرور حاصل گردید در سایه عنایت جمال
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @praise and encouragement, @review of publications, @the power of words; of speech, @call to action
